title: elatostema lineolatum var. helferi
intro: Elatostema lineolatum var. helferi is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, commonly known as the Helfer's Elatostema or Elatostema lineolatum. This plant is traditionally used in various parts of the world, including India and Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Elatostema lineolatum var. helferi include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
